Itetoeotirstodotsstistiotsiststiirstsrjirsitstodtod

You want it? Here it is! ↓↓↓

EPIC RAP BATTLES OF MESSSSSSSSSSSSSS

Modern Day Educated Woman vs 1600s Lawyer!

BEGIN!

Modern Day Educated Woman:

Yo, I'm a modern day woman, educated and fly,

Got degrees to match my ambition, reaching for the sky.

You're from the 1600s, your laws are old and dry,

I'll school you in equality, watch your misogyny die.

Your wigs are whack, your briefs are so last millennium,

I'm fluent in feminism, your pathetic argument is venom.

I've got options, I'm living my best life, no permission needed,

While you're stuck in the past, your prejudice is conceded.

1600s Lawyer:

Hark! A harridan spouts nonsense, her tongue is vile,

In 1600s, a woman's place is home, to tend and beguile.

You think you're enlightened, but you're a mere pretender,

Your so-called education is naught but a trendy blender.

I've spent years in study, the law is my domain,

You're just a harlot, your knowledge is feigned.

Go back to the kitchen, leave legal matters to me,

For in my time, women were property, not free!

Modern Day Educated Woman:

Oh please, your chauvinism is so pathetically passé,

In my world, I'm equals with men, we work and play.

You might have degrees, but you lack the emotional I.Q.,

To
creator: plantagen
